payload.planText: Gallery in-section navigation plan. Section 4 tasks: (1) Create shared app/components/GalleryGrid.tsx with prev/next chevron arrows on desktop, keyboard ArrowLeft ArrowRight Escape, mobile swipe left/right, curated-order index, stop at ends. (2) Wire foodphotography page to shared component. (3) Wire propertyphotography page to shared component. (4) Delete obsolete per-page GalleryGrid files and verify mobile swipe. This plan intentionally contains no documentation or ADR task tags because the repo has no engineering-docs scaffold and the change is a minor component consolidation.
